_comment: Copy to servers.json — that file is gitignored, this one is the template.
Each key becomes a URL path: 'time' is served at /servers/time/mcp (Streamable HTTP)
and /servers/time/sse (the older transport). Register that URL in Calivi under
Settings -> MCP, transport HTTP, no secret: the bridge has no authentication, which is
why it must never be given a published port.
'command' points at the venv built in the Dockerfile, never at a bare 'npx'/'uvx' —
nothing here should be downloaded at run time.
